name_en: 🆕 【M21060 Black】For this winter, this Pillow Palm Springs mini backpack is crafted from comfortable padded Econyl recycled nylon, embellished with a Monogram pattern. Soft handles and an adjustable canvas strap offer versatile styling options, releasing a dynamic style at home, on the street, or at ski resorts. Detailed features 17 x 22 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width) Z.
